  • Uses of Engine in com.stevenlagoy.presidency.map

    Methods in com.stevenlagoy.presidency.map with parameters of type Engine
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    double
    State.getPartyControl(Party party, Engine engine)
    Returns a double value representing the level of control of a party, based on control of the state legislature, governor, and previous electoral results.
    void
    State.setGovernor(Engine engine, StateOfficial governor)

    void
    State.setSenators(Engine engine, List<FederalOfficial> senators)
    Sets the senators list to the first two FederalOfficials in the passed List, and generates any necessary.
